title: Raw Ore Block Blasting
description: Blast raw ore block in to there smelted variant.
body:
Now with feature even you can blast all of your raw ore block in to their smooth smelted counterparts. 

This Wondrous data pack add the ability to turn raw ore blocks in to normal block.
It is 8 times as long as smelting the regular ingots but it has 9 times the xp!
This feature works for all the raw ore block variants in vanilla (iron, god, copper)
